action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline 3 epochs got worst_region_accuracy=0.3675 (Africa=36.75%, overall=53.31%). NaN train_loss from float16 AMP. Each epoch ~700s. Analysis: Need to fix NaN loss, train longer, and improve Africa region accuracy. With 9.37h remaining and ~700s/epoch, I can do ~45 more epochs total. Decision: Fix AMP (use bfloat16), train 15 epochs with cosine LR schedule, label smoothing, and region-balanced sampling. Also increase backbone LR slightly since model is learning well.
